title: Greg Mitchell
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Greg Mitchell''' wrote the backstory of the ''[[Dusty Duck]]'', and co-wrote the backstory of [[Silya Shessaun/Legends|Silya Shessaun]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

His alias is "Hedec Ga" on [[StarWars.com]] and he is [http://boards.theforce.net/members/1246483 HedecGa] on [[TheForce.net]].

==Works==
===Bibliography===
*{{DB|character|silyashessaun|Shessaun, Silya}} (co-written by ''Twi'LekEntertainer'', [[Evan Burger]] and [[Master Starkeiller]]) - April [[2006]]
*{{DB|starship|dustyduck|Dusty Duck}} - August [[2006]]
*{{SW|url=news/the-not-so-magnificent-seven|text=The Not-So Magnificent Seven|int=The Not-So Magnificent Seven}} - September [[2013]]
*{{SW|url=news/the-star-wars-spy-game-spin-declassified|text=The Star Wars Spy Game: SPIN Declassified|int=The Star Wars Spy Game: SPIN Declassified}} - December [[2013]]
